meaning: n.作衣服饰物用之小金属片,古威尼斯金币
examples: I suppose I tripped on a red sequin on the ice.
This was the only sequin we found on the bed, right?
In fact, the word sequin comes from the Arabic dar al sikka, which means mint.
Instead, the full-length, sequin-and-rhinestone-encrusted number will be the "crown jewel" of an e-commerce collectibles Web site the pair expect to launch next year.
